basics.name: Farruh Kushnazarov
basics.label: Senior GenAI Architect
basics.summary: Senior GenAI Architect at Alibaba Cloud Intelligence with a Ph.D. in Mathematical Modeling and 10+ years of experience across AI research and industry. Specialising in agentic AI systems, RAG, LLM optimisation, and enterprise-grade GenAI solutions.

work.name: Alibaba Cloud Intelligence
highlights: Design and deploy agentic AI systems using Qwen, AgentScope, CosyVoice, and FunAudioLLM
Architect production-grade RAG pipelines and LLM fine-tuning workflows for global enterprises
Deliver technical talks at international conferences (GITEX, Tuya Summit) and webinars
Publish open-source tutorials and demos on the Alibaba Cloud YouTube channel

work.name: Midea Group
highlights: Developed anomaly detection systems for HVAC equipment using machine learning
Built semantic web representations for building operation systems

work.name: iTutorGroup – Ping An
highlights: Applied NLP and deep learning to EdTech and FinTech use cases
Built text summarisation and consumer profiling models

work.name: Domus Sapiens
highlights: Research on smart building systems and IoT data analytics

work.name: Tashkent Railway Engineers Institute
work.summary: Taught mathematical modeling and computer science; conducted research in distributed systems and communication protocols.

courses: Dissertation on optimisation of information transmission reliability in transport networks
